sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.1g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, glycemic behaviour matters a ton.
sections.subtitleText: 0.1g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, glycemic behaviour matters a ton.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 6.4g of carbs. starch is doing most of the heavy lifting here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.
sections.subtitleText: 6.4g of carbs. starch is doing most of the heavy lifting here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 0.9g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.
sections.subtitleText: 0.9g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 23% daily value stands out most. that is only mild support overall.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 23% daily value stands out most. that is only mild support overall.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: minerals are basically not part of the case here.
sections.subtitleText: minerals are basically not part of the case here.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: practical staple carb source because tubers are often judged by how usable they are day to day. whole-food carb package because that matters because it is a cleaner baseline than heavily refined carbs. can be quite filling because a useful practical strength when the preparation stays sensible.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: still a carb-heavy category because that is the core ceiling tubers have to manage. preparation changes outcomes a lot because what you do to a tuber can make or break it. protein support is weak because tubers still need help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Turnip does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
